parameters.content:
## Webinar Recording to 5-Day Drip Email Course Creator — WayinVideo AI Clipping + GPT-4o-mini + Google Sheets

For course creators, coaches, educators, and marketing teams who run webinars and want to automatically repurpose them into a 5-day email mini-course. Submit any webinar recording URL via the form. WayinVideo AI Clipping API extracts the top 5 most engaging teaching moments ranked by engagement score — sorted highest first so the best content becomes Day 1. GPT-4o-mini writes a complete standalone email lesson for each clip — Day 1 is welcoming and introduces the course, the final day wraps up and points to next steps, middle days continue naturally. Each email includes a subject line (40–55 chars), preview text (85–100 chars), email body (200–300 words), key takeaway, CTA text, and a CTA URL placeholder. All 5 email lessons are saved to Google Sheets as a ready-to-use drip course with Draft status.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Webinar URL + Course Details** collects the recording URL, webinar title, mini-course name, target audience, brand name, and email tone
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit AI Clipping** submits the URL for AI clipping with 60–90 second target clip duration, limit 5, export disabled
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Clip Results** polls the clips results endpoint
- **5. IF — Clipping Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Extract Clips + Assign Days** sorts clips by score descending, assigns Day 1–5, and returns one item per clip
- **8. AI Agent — Write Email Lesson** uses GPT-4o-mini with 10 email writing rules to produce 6 labeled output sections per day
- **10. Code — Parse Email Output** extracts all 6 sections via regex and computes word count
- **11. Google Sheets — Save Email Course** appends one row per day with all 16 fields and Status set to Draft

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit AI Clipping** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Clip Results** — replace `YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY`
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. Google Sheets — Save Email Course** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`
4. Create a Google Sheet tab named Drip Email Course with columns: Webinar Title, Course Name, Day Number, Email Subject, Preview Text, Email Body, Key Takeaway, CTA Text, CTA URL Placeholder, Word Count, Clip Title, Clip Score, Clip Timestamp, Webinar URL, Generated On, Status

## Form Input
User submits webinar recording URL, webinar title, mini-course name, target audience, brand name, and email tone. All six fields feed into clip extraction and the AI email writing prompt.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo AI Clipping Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo AI Clipping Submit and Poll
Submits the webinar URL for AI clipping — 60–90 second clips, limit 5, export disabled. Waits 90 seconds for initial processing. Polls the clips results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Clipping Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Clipping Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to clip extraction. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until clips are ready.

nodes.name: Section — Clip Extraction and AI Email Lesson Writing

parameters.content:
## Clip Extraction and AI Email Lesson Writing
Sorts clips by engagement score descending and assigns Day 1–5. GPT-4o-mini writes a complete email lesson per clip — Day 1 is welcoming, last day is a conclusion, middle days continue naturally.

nodes.name: Section — Email Parse and Google Sheets Save

parameters.content:
## Email Parse and Google Sheets Save
Regex extracts 6 labeled sections and computes word count. Google Sheets appends one row per day with all 16 fields including CTA URL placeholder and Status set to Draft.

parameters.formDescription: Paste your webinar recording URL. AI will extract the top 5 teaching moments and write a complete 5-day email mini-course ready to send to your audience.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert email copywriter who specializes in writing high-converting educational email courses from video content.

A webinar has been automatically clipped into key teaching moments. Your job is to write a complete standalone email lesson for Day {{ $json.dayNumber }} of a {{ $json.totalDays }}-day mini email course — based on this specific clip.

---

## COURSE CONTEXT
- Webinar Title: {{ $json.webinarTitle }}
- Mini-Course Name: {{ $json.courseName }}
- Target Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
- Brand / Sender: {{ $json.brandName }}
- Email Tone: {{ $json.emailTone }}
- Day: {{ $json.dayNumber }} of {{ $json.totalDays }}

## THIS CLIP (Day {{ $json.dayNumber }} Lesson)
- Clip Title: {{ $json.clipTitle }}
- Description: {{ $json.clipDescription }}
- Engagement Score: {{ $json.clipScore }}/100
- Tags: {{ $json.clipTags }}
- Timestamp in Recording: {{ $json.timestampStart }} — {{ $json.timestampEnd }}

---

## EMAIL WRITING RULES
1. Write based ONLY on the clip content provided — no invented information
2. Match the tone specified — keep it consistent throughout
3. Day 1 email should feel welcoming — introduce the course briefly before the lesson
4. Final day email should feel like a conclusion — celebrate completion and point to next step
5. Middle days should feel like natural continuation
6. Subject line: 40-55 characters — curiosity or benefit driven — no clickbait
7. Preview text: 85-100 characters — complements subject, not a repeat
8. Email body: 200-300 words — short, punchy paragraphs, easy to read
9. One clear CTA at the end — action-oriented
10. Key takeaway: one sentence — the single most important thing to remember

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

SUBJECT_LINE:
[Write subject line here — 40-55 characters]

PREVIEW_TEXT:
[Write preview text here — 85-100 characters]

EMAIL_BODY:
[Write full email body here — 200-300 words — short paragraphs — conversational]

KEY_TAKEAWAY:
[Write one sentence takeaway here]

CTA_TEXT:
[Write the CTA button text — 3-6 words — action oriented]

CTA_URL_PLACEHOLDER:
[Write a placeholder for the CTA URL — e.g. YOUR_COURSE_LINK or YOUR_WEBSITE_LINK]

---

Now write the Day {{ $json.dayNumber }} email lesson:
